description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.

description: naval training base for the United States Navy, outside of Chicago, Illinois
description_wiki: Naval Station Great Lakes (NAVSTA Great Lakes) is the home of the United States Navy's only current boot camp, located near North Chicago, in Lake County, Illinois, along Lake Michigan.

description: land warfare branch of Germany's military since 1955
description_wiki: The German Army (German: Heer, lit. 'army') is the land component of the armed forces of Germany.

description: global war originating in Europe, 1914–1918
description_wiki: World War I, or the First World War (28 July 1914 – 11 November 1918), also known as The Great War, was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies (or Entente) and the Central Powers.

description: country in Western Europe and other continents (through its overseas territories in America, Africa and Oceania)
description_wiki: France, officially the French Republic, is a country primarily located in Western Europe.

description: 1949 original cast recording starring Mary Martin, Ezio Pinza
1944-1945 World War II battle
description_wiki: The Battle of the Bulge, also known as the Ardennes Offensive, was the last major German offensive campaign on the Western Front during the Second World War, taking place from 16 December 1944 to 25 January 1945.

description: ground force of the Austro-Hungarian Dual Monarchy from 1867 to 1918
description_wiki: The Austro-Hungarian Army, also known as the Imperial and Royal Army, was the principal ground force of Austria-Hungary from 1867 to 1918, one of the two branches of the Austro-Hungarian Armed Forces.

description: city in and county seat of Milwaukee County, and largest city in State of Wisconsin, United States
description_wiki: Milwaukee is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Wisconsin.

description_wiki: Pascagoula ( PASS-kuh-GOOL-uh) is a city in and the county seat of Jackson County, Mississippi, United States.

description: war between North and South Korea, 1950–1953
description_wiki: The Korean War (25 June 1950 – 27 July 1953) was an armed conflict the Korean Peninsula fought between North Korea (Democratic People's Republic of Korea; DPRK) and South Korea (Republic of Korea; ROK) and their allies.

description_wiki: Alaska (  ə-LASS-kə) is a non-contiguous U.S. state located in the northwestern regions of North America.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Oklahoma (  OH-klə-HOH-mə; Choctaw: Oklahumma, pronounced [oklahómma]) is a landlocked state in the South Central and Southwestern region of the United States.
